title: Probably already been asked but EoE question
display_title: Probably already been asked but EoE question
wikitext:
[]: Probably already been asked, but (EoE question)             Quote Post by Shiro » Wed Oct 31, 2007 10:09 am Why in 25', Rei's nipples and whatnot are censored to the point of absurdity, (I mean, come on. She could just stand all the way behind Gendo. She doesn't have to look like she's a freak of nature...) but in the first 30 seconds of 26', nipples are displayed to the world. I've always wondered why this was. Is it because Death and Rebirth had no nipples or something, and 25' is the first part of EoE and the last part of Death and Rebirth? I've never seen it, so I don't know for sure.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Wed Oct 31, 2007 10:39 am Well, it's probably to do with the fact that showing the nipples of a 14-year-old is not cool, but when she's a giant, it's okay. Something like that, anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by JP » Wed Oct 31, 2007 10:44 am Maybe they didn't want to over-do it with the frontal top nudity. Like in the US I think you can curse with the big F and S words a few times but still get a pg-13 rating. But do it a lot, and you'll get R.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Oct 31, 2007 10:48 am I doubt it's because of Rebirth. We had a pretty good look at Asuka's nipples at the beginning, and Rebirth ended at the Harpies circling around.

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Wed Oct 31, 2007 11:00 am Symbolically, I assumed it was kind've like her ripping away from Gendo and becoming her own person. She stands behind him kind've timid until she rebels against him and seems brave and unashamed. Maybe I'm reading into things too much?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Oct 31, 2007 12:03 pm or she didn't want to get shot by a crazed Ritsuko.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Oct 31, 2007 2:43 pm Ornette wrote: or she didn't want to get shot by a crazed Ritsuko.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 31, 2007 3:38 pm maybe they didnt want to make it look extreme like its Hentai or something maybe all the nipples in Evangelion are like that, theyre very hard to see the 1st time i watched EoE and it showed Asuka, i didnt even notice they showed them. and when Rei became all giant Lilith and crap, you could only see it on the side views. but if you look straight at it, all you see is white which supports that all nipples in Evangelion are pale and hard to see

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Oct 31, 2007 3:50 pm I am disappointed that no-one has yet mentioned this thread http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=395 on a closely related topic. I guess it's always left to the resident Dirty Old Man to keep track of such things :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 31, 2007 4:08 pm o! so m not crazy that that thing did look like that certain female part......(i'll shut up now)

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Wed Oct 31, 2007 5:09 pm If you should be seeing Rei's nipples, what about lips? And male nipples? And phalli? That last one should be most apparent too. Or do they just attempt to hide it...?

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Wed Oct 31, 2007 6:03 pm It can't be just GNR nipples, cause when Gendo cops a feel right before, you see her nipples. And I don't believe you actually see Asuka's nipples, I thought that was just the cords on her doing the monitoring... lol. I"d have to watch it again. I don't think that they are her nipples though, cause then the censoring would be just damn inconsistent. EDIT: Oh, in Death and Rebirth, nipples are visible? Is that what you meant? If so, then, I'm lost.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Oct 31, 2007 6:36 pm Shiro wrote: It can't be just GNR nipples, cause when Gendo cops a feel right before, you see her nipples. And I don't believe you actually see Asuka's nipples, I thought that was just the cords on her doing the monitoring... lol. I"d have to watch it again. I don't think that they are her nipples though, cause then the censoring would be just damn inconsistent. EDIT: Oh, in Death and Rebirth, nipples are visible? Is that what you meant? If so, then, I'm lost.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Wed Oct 31, 2007 6:54 pm Orly? Maybe it was just my Manga Entertainment release of EoE then. When I watched it, I didn't see em at all. Either I'm blind, that was from D&R, (you didn't say) or the original Manga Entertainment release sucked. Cause in my version, his hand isn't anywhere near Asuka's breasts, and there's white fog all over.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 31, 2007 6:56 pm that fog was the blurred image of her breasts

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Wed Oct 31, 2007 6:58 pm No, I don't even mean in that shot. In the ME release, the entire room is very pale. Not just around her breasts. That gif was very brightly coloured. ME's release was very pale. I'm betting that was from Rebirth, or ME's version sucked.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Oct 31, 2007 6:59 pm Shiro wrote: ME's version sucked.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Wed Oct 31, 2007 7:00 pm So then, that gif that Ornette posted was from EoE, just the Renewal release?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Oct 31, 2007 7:28 pm Shiro wrote: So then, that gif that Ornette posted was from EoE, just the Renewal release?

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Wed Oct 31, 2007 7:48 pm I think it's just all about whether if Anno wants us to focus on the boobies or Shinji's hand and the actual act of jacking off to a good friend that he just wants to talk to.
